title: Docs truth and home-place phase
summary: Lane 1 should keep the public repo story truthful, then spend the next feel pass on a more visibly transformed station or nursery instead of another text seam.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the docs, tooling, and naming sync handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The public-facing repo should match the real game and commands before another wave lands.

execution_order.goal: Implement the docs, tooling, and naming sync pass.
execution_order.why_now: Repo truth matters for future contributors and future-you.

execution_order.goal: Review the docs, tooling, and naming sync pass.
execution_order.why_now: The repo should not undersell the game or reference commands that are not real.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the stronger home-place transformation handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The station and nursery should now feel more visibly shaped by the player's season.

execution_order.goal: Implement the stronger home-place transformation pass.
execution_order.why_now: Return payoffs should become more visible and earned without widening the shell.

execution_order.goal: Review the stronger home-place transformation pass.
execution_order.why_now: The home place should feel more changed, not more crowded.

guardrails: Do not add a new station page or dashboard.
Keep docs truthful to the local repo rather than stale public assumptions.
Prefer visible payoff over more text in the home-place pass.

implementation_targets: docs/architecture.md helper-module ownership after the field-station-state and field-request-state splits
docs/content-authoring.md world-map location guidance for mapReturnPost, corridorDoors, and approach labels
naming_seams: `field menu` should become plain `menu` in public docs
`nursery / teaching garden` should become compact nursery plus teaching-bed wording
season shell wording should prefer `routes`, `expedition`, and `season` over vaguer home-base terms
required_checks: live biome and system count reads accurately
public naming matches current station, nursery, route, and chapter terms
share or packaging guidance does not imply stale prototype scope
avoid: introducing aspirational systems as if they already ship

preferred_surfaces: small station-side ground accents tied to live progress
state_inputs: season progress and filed route milestones
recommended_shape: keep nursery state driving the center planter
let filed route progress add one left and one right lower-shell accent on the same sill line
treat the three-route or filed-season state as the ceiling for a slightly more connected threshold read
